seoTitle: How to Find Your Freshdesk URL
metaDescription: Learn how to locate your unique Freshdesk account URL so you can log in or set up integrations correctly.
intro: Your Freshdesk URL is the unique web address for your account, and you'll need it for logging in or configuring integrations. This guide shows how to find it.

steps.heading: Check your welcome email
steps.body: Your Freshdesk account URL was typically included in the welcome email sent when the account was first created.

steps.heading: Look at your browser address bar
steps.body: When logged in to Freshdesk, your account's unique domain appears directly in the browser's address bar.

steps.heading: Check your admin settings
steps.body: Your account URL or domain is also usually listed within the general account settings page.

steps.heading: Save it for future reference
steps.body: Note the URL down somewhere safe since you'll need it any time you log in or set up an integration.

faq.question: What does a Freshdesk URL look like?
faq.answer: It typically follows the format of your chosen subdomain followed by freshdesk.com.

faq.question: Can I change my Freshdesk URL?
faq.answer: Changing your account's subdomain may be possible through support, though it's not always a simple self-service change.

faq.question: Why do I need my Freshdesk URL for integrations?
faq.answer: Many integrations require your specific account URL to know where to send or retrieve data.

faq.question: What if I forgot my Freshdesk URL?
faq.answer: You can typically recover it by checking your original welcome email or using Freshdesk's account recovery options.
